judge_result.short_rationale: Core required actions and order match the source: remove from contaminated area, keep resting, seek medical attention if symptoms develop or persist. However, the added unconditional 'get medical treatment immediately' escalation conflicts with the source's conditional escalation, so correctness and grounding are reduced.
